name: conversion_rate_metric_infinite_window
check_query:
SELECT
  opportunities.metric_time AS metric_time__day
  , CAST(conversions.buys AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NULLIF(opportunities.visits, 0) AS DOUBLE) AS visit_buy_conversion_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    metric_time, SUM(a.visits) AS visits
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ds AS metric_time, 1 AS visits
    FROM main.fct_visits visits
  ) a
  GROUP BY
    a.metric_time
) opportunities
FULL OUTER JOIN (
  SELECT
    b.ds AS metric_time, SUM(b.buys) AS buys
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
    first_value(v.ds) OVER (PARTITION BY buy_source.ds, buy_source.user_id ORDER BY v.ds DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS ds
    , first_value(v.user_id) OVER (PARTITION BY buy_source.ds, buy_source.user_id ORDER BY v.ds DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS user_id
    , first_value(v.referrer_id) OVER (PARTITION BY buy_source.ds, buy_source.user_id ORDER BY v.ds DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS referrer_id
    , buy_source.uuid
    , 1 AS buys
    FROM main.fct_visits v
    INNER JOIN
    (
      SELECT *, GEN_RANDOM_UUID() AS uuid FROM main.fct_buys
    ) buy_source
    ON
      v.user_id = buy_source.user_id AND v.ds <= buy_source.ds
  ) b
  GROUP BY
    b.ds
) conversions
ON opportunities.metric_time = conversions.metric_time

name: windowed_cumulative_metric
check_query:
SELECT
  SUM(b.txn_revenue) as trailing_2_months_revenue
  , a.ds AS metric_time__day
FROM (
  SELECT ds
  FROM main.mf_time_spine
  WHERE CAST(ds AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('2020-01-05' AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(ds AS TIMESTAMP) < CAST('2021-01-05' AS TIMESTAMP)
) a
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT
    revenue as txn_revenue
    , created_at AS ds
  FROM main.fct_revenue
) b
ON b.ds <= a.ds AND b.ds > a.ds - INTERVAL 2 month
WHERE CAST(a.ds AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('2020-03-05' AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(a.ds AS TIMESTAMP) < CAST('2021-01-05' AS TIMESTAMP)
GROUP BY a.ds
ORDER BY a.ds

name: windowed_cumulative_metric_with_joined_dim
check_query:
SELECT
  SUM(revenue) as trailing_2_months_revenue
  , b.user__home_state_latest as user__home_state_latest
  , a.ds AS metric_time__day
FROM (
  SELECT ds
  FROM main.mf_time_spine
  WHERE CAST(ds AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('2020-01-05' AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(ds AS TIMESTAMP) < CAST('2021-01-05' AS TIMESTAMP)
) a
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT
    m.revenue as revenue
    , u.home_state_latest as user__home_state_latest
    , m.created_at AS ds
  FROM main.fct_revenue m
  LEFT OUTER JOIN main.dim_users_latest u
  ON m.user_id = u.user_id
  GROUP BY m.created_at, m.revenue, u.home_state_latest
) b
ON b.ds <= a.ds AND b.ds > a.ds - INTERVAL 2 month
WHERE CAST(a.ds AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('2020-03-05' AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(a.ds AS TIMESTAMP) < CAST('2021-01-05' AS TIMESTAMP)
GROUP BY a.ds, user__home_state_latest
ORDER by a.ds, user__home_state_latest

name: multiple_cumulative_metrics
check_query:
SELECT revenue_all_time, trailing_2_months_revenue, a.ds AS metric_time__day
FROM (
    SELECT
      SUM(revenue) as revenue_all_time
      , ds
    FROM (
        SELECT
            b.revenue as revenue
            , a.ds AS ds
        FROM (
          SELECT ds
          FROM main.mf_time_spine
          WHERE CAST(ds AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('2020-03-31' AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(ds AS TIMESTAMP) < CAST('2021-01-06' AS TIMESTAMP)
        ) a
        INNER JOIN (
          SELECT
            revenue
            , created_at
          FROM main.fct_revenue
        ) b
        ON b.created_at <= a.ds
    ) a
    GROUP BY ds
) a
FULL OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT
      SUM(b.txn_revenue) as trailing_2_months_revenue
      , a.ds
    FROM (
      SELECT ds
      FROM main.mf_time_spine
      WHERE CAST(ds AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('2020-01-31' AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(ds AS TIMESTAMP) < CAST('2021-01-06' AS TIMESTAMP)
    ) a
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT
          revenue as txn_revenue
          , created_at AS ds
        FROM main.fct_revenue
    ) b
    ON b.ds <= a.ds AND b.ds > a.ds - INTERVAL 2 month
    GROUP BY a.ds
) b
ON a.ds = b.ds
WHERE CAST(a.ds AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('2020-03-31' AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(a.ds AS TIMESTAMP) < CAST('2021-01-06' AS TIMESTAMP)
ORDER BY a.ds

name: all_time_metric_with_non_default_grains
check_query:
SELECT
  metric_time__week
  , metric_time__quarter
  , revenue_all_time
FROM (
  SELECT
    metric_time__week
    , metric_time__quarter
    , LAST_VALUE(revenue_all_time) OVER (
      PARTITION BY metric_time__week, metric_time__quarter
      ORDER BY metric_time__day
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
    ) AS revenue_all_time
  FROM (
    SELECT
      t.ds AS metric_time__day
      , DATE_TRUNC('week', CAST(T.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS metric_time__week
      , DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS metric_time__quarter
      , SUM(r.revenue) AS revenue_all_time
    FROM main.mf_time_spine t
    INNER JOIN main.fct_revenue r ON DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(r.created_at AS TIMESTAMP)) <= t.ds
    GROUP BY
      t.ds
      , DATE_TRUNC('week', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
      , DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
  ) subq_7
) subq_8
GROUP BY
  metric_time__week
  , metric_time__quarter
  , revenue_all_time

name: window_metric_with_non_default_grains
check_query:
SELECT
  revenue_instance__ds__month
  , metric_time__week
  , trailing_2_months_revenue
FROM (
  SELECT
    revenue_instance__ds__month
    , metric_time__week
    , AVG(trailing_2_months_revenue) OVER (
      PARTITION BY revenue_instance__ds__month, metric_time__week
      ORDER BY metric_time__day
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
    ) AS trailing_2_months_revenue
  FROM (
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS revenue_instance__ds__month
      , t.ds AS metric_time__day
      , DATE_TRUNC('week', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS metric_time__week
      , SUM(r.revenue) AS trailing_2_months_revenue
    FROM main.mf_time_spine t
    INNER JOIN main.fct_revenue r
    ON
      (
        DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(r.created_at AS TIMESTAMP)) <= t.ds
      ) AND (
        DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(r.created_at AS TIMESTAMP)) > t.ds - INTERVAL 2 month
      )
    GROUP BY
      DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
      , t.ds
      , DATE_TRUNC('week', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
  ) subq_7
) subq_8
GROUP BY
  revenue_instance__ds__month
  , metric_time__week
  , trailing_2_months_revenue

name: grain_to_date_metric_with_non_default_grains
check_query:
SELECT
  revenue_instance__ds__quarter
  , revenue_instance__ds__year
  , revenue_mtd
FROM (
  SELECT
    revenue_instance__ds__quarter
    , revenue_instance__ds__year
    , FIRST_VALUE(revenue_mtd) OVER (
      PARTITION BY revenue_instance__ds__quarter, revenue_instance__ds__year
      ORDER BY metric_time__day
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
    ) AS revenue_mtd
  FROM (
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS revenue_instance__ds__quarter
      , DATE_TRUNC('year', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS revenue_instance__ds__year
      , t.ds AS metric_time__day
      , SUM(r.revenue) AS revenue_mtd
    FROM main.mf_time_spine t
    INNER JOIN main.fct_revenue r
    ON
      (
        DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(r.created_at AS TIMESTAMP)) <= t.ds
      ) AND (
        DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(r.created_at AS TIMESTAMP)) >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
      )
    GROUP BY
      DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
      , DATE_TRUNC('year', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
      , t.ds
  ) subq_7
) subq_8
GROUP BY
  revenue_instance__ds__quarter
  , revenue_instance__ds__year
  , revenue_mtd

name: derived_cumulative_metric_with_non_default_grains

  metric_time__month
  , metric_time__year
  , t2mr - 10 AS trailing_2_months_revenue_sub_10
FROM (
  SELECT
    metric_time__month
    , metric_time__year
    , t2mr
  FROM (
    SELECT
      metric_time__month
      , metric_time__year
      , AVG(t2mr) OVER (
        PARTITION BY metric_time__month, metric_time__year
        ORDER BY metric_time__day
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
      ) AS t2mr
    FROM (
      SELECT
        t.ds AS metric_time__day
        , DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS metric_time__month
        , DATE_TRUNC('year', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS metric_time__year
        , SUM(r.revenue) AS t2mr
      FROM main.mf_time_spine t
      INNER JOIN main.fct_revenue r
      ON
        (
          DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(r.created_at AS TIMESTAMP)) <= t.ds
        ) AND (
          DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(r.created_at AS TIMESTAMP)) > t.ds - INTERVAL 2 month
        )
      GROUP BY
        t.ds
        , DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
        , DATE_TRUNC('year', CAST(t.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) subq_7
  ) subq_8
  GROUP BY
    metric_time__month
    , metric_time__year
    , t2mr
) subq_9

    , MAX(subq_5.visits) AS visits

CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(buys) AS buys
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      FIRST_VALUE(subq_11.visits) OVER (
        PARTITION BY
          subq_14.user
          , subq_14.ds__day
          , subq_14.mf_internal_uuid
        ORDER BY subq_11.ds__day DESC
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
      ) AS visits
      , FIRST_VALUE(subq_11.metric_time__alien_day) OVER (
        PARTITION BY
          subq_14.user
          , subq_14.ds__day
          , subq_14.mf_internal_uuid
        ORDER BY subq_11.ds__day DESC
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
      ) AS metric_time__alien_day
      , FIRST_VALUE(subq_11.ds__day) OVER (
        PARTITION BY
          subq_14.user
          , subq_14.ds__day
          , subq_14.mf_internal_uuid
        ORDER BY subq_11.ds__day DESC
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
      ) AS ds__day
      , FIRST_VALUE(subq_11.metric_time__day) OVER (
        PARTITION BY
          subq_14.user
          , subq_14.ds__day
          , subq_14.mf_internal_uuid
        ORDER BY subq_11.ds__day DESC
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
      ) AS metric_time__day
      , FIRST_VALUE(subq_11.user) OVER (
        PARTITION BY
          subq_14.user
          , subq_14.ds__day
          , subq_14.mf_internal_uuid
        ORDER BY subq_11.ds__day DESC
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
      ) AS user
      , subq_14.mf_internal_uuid AS mf_internal_uuid
      , subq_14.buys AS buys
    FROM (
      SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(v2.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS ds__day
        , DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(v2.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS metric_time__day
        , v2.user_id AS user
        , 1 AS visits
        , subq_8.alien_day AS metric_time__alien_day
      FROM main.fct_visits v2
      LEFT OUTER JOIN main.mf_time_spine subq_8 ON DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(v2.ds AS TIMESTAMP)) = subq_8.ds
      WHERE CAST(subq_8.alien_day AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('2019-12-20' AS TIMESTAMP)
    ) subq_11
    INNER JOIN (
      SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(ds AS TIMESTAMP)) AS ds__day
        , user_id AS user
        , 1 AS buys
        , GEN_RANDOM_UUID() AS mf_internal_uuid
      FROM main.fct_buys b
    ) subq_14
    ON subq_11.user = subq_14.user AND subq_11.ds__day <= subq_14.ds__day
  ) subq_15
) subq_18

name: custom_offset_window
check_query:
WITH cte AS (
  SELECT
    ds AS ds__day
    , alien_day AS ds__alien_day
    , FIRST_VALUE(ds) OVER (
      PARTITION BY alien_day
      ORDER BY ds
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
    ) AS ds__alien_day__first_value
    , LAST_VALUE(ds) OVER (
      PARTITION BY alien_day
      ORDER BY ds
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
    ) AS ds__alien_day__last_value
    , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY alien_day
      ORDER BY ds
    ) AS ds__day__row_number
  FROM main.mf_time_spine ts
)

SELECT
  subq_8.ds__day__lead AS metric_time__day
  , SUM(1) AS bookings_offset_one_alien_day
FROM (
  SELECT
    cte.ds__day AS ds__day
    , CASE
      WHEN subq_7.ds__alien_day__first_value__offset + INTERVAL ((cte.ds__day__row_number - 1)) day <= subq_7.ds__alien_day__last_value__offset
        THEN subq_7.ds__alien_day__first_value__offset + INTERVAL ((cte.ds__day__row_number - 1)) day
      ELSE subq_7.ds__alien_day__last_value__offset
    END AS ds__day__lead
  FROM cte
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
      ds__alien_day
      , LEAD(ds__alien_day__first_value, 1) OVER (ORDER BY ds__alien_day) AS ds__alien_day__first_value__offset
      , LEAD(ds__alien_day__last_value, 1) OVER (ORDER BY ds__alien_day) AS ds__alien_day__last_value__offset
    FROM (
      SELECT
        ds__alien_day__first_value
        , ds__alien_day__last_value
        , ds__alien_day
      FROM cte
      GROUP BY
        ds__alien_day__first_value
        , ds__alien_day__last_value
        , ds__alien_day
    ) subq_5
  ) subq_7
  ON cte.ds__alien_day = subq_7.ds__alien_day
) subq_8
INNER JOIN main.fct_bookings b ON subq_8.ds__day = DATE_TRUNC('day', CAST(b.ds AS TIMESTAMP))
GROUP BY subq_8.ds__day__lead

name: derived_metric_in_where_filter
check_query:
SELECT

    , booking_value * views AS listing__views_times_booking_value
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(b.listing_id, c.listing_id) AS listing_id
      , MAX(b.booking_value) AS booking_value
      , MAX(c.views) AS views
    FROM (
      SELECT
        listing_id
        , SUM(booking_value) AS booking_value
      FROM main.fct_bookings
      GROUP BY listing_id
    ) b
    FULL OUTER JOIN (
      SELECT
        listing_id
        , SUM(1) AS views
      FROM main.fct_views
      GROUP BY listing_id
    ) c
    ON b.listing_id = c.listing_id
    GROUP BY COALESCE(b.listing_id, c.listing_id)
  ) inner_from_subq
) d ON a.listing_id = d.listing_id
WHERE listing__views_times_booking_value > 2

name: semi_additive_measure_query_with_where_filter
check_query:
SELECT
  b.user AS user
  , SUM(b.current_account_balance_by_user) AS current_account_balance_by_user
FROM (
  SELECT
    ds
    , a.user
    , current_account_balance_by_user
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ds
      , user_id AS user
      , account_type
      , account_balance AS current_account_balance_by_user
    FROM main.fct_accounts
  ) a
  WHERE account_type = 'savings'
) b
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT
    c.user
    , MAX(ds) AS ds__complete
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ds
      , user_id AS user
      , account_type
    FROM main.fct_accounts
  ) c
  WHERE account_type = 'savings'
  GROUP BY
    c.user
) d
ON
  (b.ds = d.ds__complete) AND (b.user = d.user)
GROUP BY
  b.user

  FROM (

      ds
    FROM main.fct_accounts

) d
ON
